heading: Erection of monuments and tablets
label: 433l Erection of monuments and tablets
text: Any State, or political subdivision thereof, organization, or individual may, with the approval of the Secretary of the Interior, erect monuments or place tablets within the boundaries of the Whitman Mission National Historic Site.
notes: Change of Name“Whitman National Monument” redesignated “Whitman Mission National Historic Site” by , set out as .Pub. L. 87–471section 433n of this title
